title: Dashboard of Life
lyrics:
Oh yeah, you see me on your mind all the time
On the dashboard of life There's no telling where the stats go
Am I doing it right? Am I making it always harder
On myself for the things I want and all I see
Yeah I'm trying to take accountability
And see me on the dashboard of life
I'm getting all my API calls right
On the dashboard of life
I'm finding where my problems begin
I gotta put a little error handling in the moment
Make it know that I can come back to the things that were trouble for me
And make them a part of my history
Go past the level and go past the line
That's what I say every motherfucking time
But for real, for real I'm checking this
New dash dashboard of life
All my knobs going in the right direction
I'm talk in beatmaps
To the bar graphs, to the pie graphs
Can I see where my data direction is going
And do I want to share that with the world
Knowing that everybody judges
And it's narcissistic moments out there
Everybody taking life for granted
And wondering about the things you can get here
That you can't take to the next level
And I'm sorry if I said that and you don't believe
But trust me, there's the metrics on ya yeah
Dashboard of life
The moment you check yourself in the mirror
On the dashboard of life
Dashboard of your only life
You better pay attention to the numbers that tell you
You better pay attention to the things they tell you
You better make your own mind up
Before you only crash and burn in this
Checking of yourself in the mirror
Don't make it so you wince so much
There's still time on the dashboard of life
You're gonna find which way and what matters to you
